issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 31 dmg (97% of 32 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: At turn seq 84 (floor 1, encounter 0, turn 20), the enemy dealt 31 damage when the player had 32 HP. This is 97% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 31 damage (97% of player's 32 HP)

issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 30 dmg (3000% of 1 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: At turn seq 88 (floor 1, encounter 0, turn 21), the enemy dealt 30 damage when the player had 1 HP. This is 3000% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 30 damage (3000% of player's 1 HP)

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 1, encounter 0 (crystal_golem) — struggling profile
issues.description: The struggling player was defeated by crystal_golem (common) on floor 1, encounter 0 after 21 turns. They dealt 58 damage but took 164. Accuracy was 46.0%. Dying on floor 1 is extremely punishing for retention.

evidence.metric: Defeated on floor 1 by crystal_golem (164 damage taken)

issues.suggestedFix: Reduce floor 1 enemy damage or HP, or add canary difficulty reduction for struggling players

issues.title: Unfun moment: HP dropped from 80 to 0 in single encounter (floor 1, crystal_golem)
issues.description: During encounter 0 on floor 1 against crystal_golem (common), the player's HP plummeted from 80 (100%) to 0 (0%). This 80 HP loss in a single encounter feels punishing and demoralizing, especially for struggling players.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap maximum damage per encounter or add a "mercy" mechanic that reduces damage after a severe hit
